response.original_title: Kerem Görsev and All That Jazz
response.overview: To speak of jazz in Turkey is to speak of Kerem Görsev. In this intimate short documentary, director Levent Türkan sits down with the maestro to unravel İstanbul’s profound impact on his art. Together, they explore his hidden inspirations and the true musical pulse of the city. A deeply personal journey into the soul of Kerem Görsev, the essence of jazz, and the beating heart of İstanbul.
response.tagline: The essence of jazz, and the beating heart of İstanbul.
response.title: Kerem Görsev and All That Jazz
